creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-07-25 22:24:16 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel/py-qt4-core    Makefile 
    devel/py-qt4-assistant Makefile 
    devel/py-qt4-dbus    Makefile 
    misc/py-qt4-demo     Makefile 
    devel/py-qt4-designerplugin Makefile

    databases/py-qt4-sql Makefile 
    graphics/py-qt4-svg  Makefile 
    devel/py-qt4-test    Makefile 
    textproc/py-qt4-xml  Makefile 
  Log:
  The first iteration of the py-qt4-* ports had a snapshot date as its
  PORTVERSION. After that the PORTVERSION became 4.foo. Because this is
  numerically lower than before, the PORTEPOCH should have been bumped.
  
  Poked by:       kris@
  
  PR:             125814
  Submitted by:   Danny Pansters <danny@ricin.com> (maintainer)
